title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 209.331 - Procedure to adopt rules
text:
209.331.  Procedure to adopt rules. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 209.285 to 209.339 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1994 S.B. 568 § 14, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
